steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $user = get_user_by('login','testuser'); if (!$user) { $user_id = wp_create_user('testuser', 'Test@12345', 'test@example.com'); } else { $user_id = $user->ID; } update_user_meta($user_id, 'kwtsms_phone', '96599220322'); $phone = get_user_meta($user_id, 'kwtsms_phone', true); echo 'Setup complete — user_id=' . $user_id . ' phone=' . $phone; ?>
